title: Mizoram PSC Assistant Controller of Mines Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Assistant Controller of Mines Notification 2026 has been released on 4 May 2026 on the official website of Mizoram PSC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Assistant Controller of Mines Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates (or as notified by the Government from time to time).

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. degree in Mining Engineering
qualification.details: B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. degree in Mining Engineering from a recognized University. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency (qualifying test or exemption as per rules).

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Controller of Mines recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 05-06-2026. Ensure all submissions are made by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Assistant Controller of Mines post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Assistant Controller of Mines post is 21 years.

faq.question: Q3. What educational qualification is required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc. degree in Mining Engineering from a recognized University, along with computer and Mizo language proficiency.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Controller of Mines position?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Assistant Controller of Mines post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Assistant Controller of Mines post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be placed at Level – 10 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available for ST/SC candidates up to 5 years, or as notified by the Government.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC).

faq.question: Q10. What is the age limit for the Assistant Controller of Mines post?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 21 years and 35 years, with provisions for age relaxation.
